title: ElytraTweaks
description: A collection of tweaks to assist with elytra flight.
body:
This is a very simple mod to make elytra flight just a little bit for flexible. Currently, it has the following features:
- Automatic swapping to elytra when you try to glide.
  - Enchanted elytra's are preferred (though specific enchantments are not checked), and if there are multiple in your inventory the one with the least remaining durability is selected. Don't ask me why I implemented it like that.
- Automatic swapping to armor when you land.
  - Armor with the best armor value is preferred, and if there are multiple with the same armor value any enchanted armor is selected (though specific enchantments are not checked).
- Hotkey to stop flying at any moment. (`V` by default)
- When you fly into water, you can immediately start swimming without needing to stop gliding first.

Please note that if you play on a server, this mod might be considered cheating. Always check if you're allowed to use this mod before doing so, or you might risk getting banned! (For which I take no responsibility)
